sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Big Tech's AI payoff hinges on revenue growth - Morgan Stanley (QQQ:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Brian Nowak advises investors to focus on revenue growth as a crucial indicator of returns on capital investments in big technology companies, especially as they prepare to report earnings. This comes amid massive investments in artificial intelligence (AI) by these firms. The article suggests that the payoff from AI for tech giants will be directly tied to their ability to translate these investments into increased revenue.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE: GL) SVP exercises options and sells 3,591 shares
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc.'s Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, Michael Shane Henrie, exercised employee stock options for 3,065 shares and subsequently sold 3,591 common shares in open-market transactions. The sales occurred at prices ranging from $154.32 to $154.89 per share. Following these transactions, Henrie directly holds 3,449.0833 common shares and indirectly holds 158.2240 shares in a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Domino's CEO sees rivals reporting weaker Q1 sales (DPZ:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza CEO Russell Weiner anticipates that competing fast-food chains will report weaker-than-expected first-quarter sales. He attributes this anticipated downturn to factors such as adverse winter weather conditions and a decline in customer sentiment. Domino's is one of the first in its sector to report earnings, giving Weiner an early perspective on market trends.

feed.title: Cadence enters 2026 with $8B backlog and a higher revenue target
feed.summary: Cadence (NASDAQ: CDNS) reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with revenue reaching $1.474 billion and a record backlog of $8.0 billion. Driven by accelerating AI demand and broad-based strength across businesses, the company raised its 2026 revenue outlook to approximately 17% year-over-year growth. Cadence is leading the agentic AI transformation in semiconductor and system design with the launch of its AgentStack platform.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (CDNS) Cadence Design Systems, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $1.47B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.45B
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (CDNS) reported its first-quarter revenue at $1.47 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.45 billion. The company also announced Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.96 per share, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $1.88. Additionally, Cadence Design Systems provided fiscal year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance in the range of $7.85-$7.95 and revenue guidance between $6.125 billion and $6.225 billion.

feed.title: Archer Secures Three-Year Contract Extension with Equinor for Wireline and Intervention Services
feed.summary: Archer has been awarded a three-year contract extension by Equinor ASA for wireline and intervention services on the Norwegian Continental Shelf, building on an original 2021 contract. This extension, valued at approximately NOK 3 billion (with half attributed to Archer), ensures continued operational continuity and strengthens Archer's position as a trusted provider. The agreement underscores the long-standing relationship between the companies and reinforces the effectiveness of Archer's alliance model.

feed.title: Major Empery Digital (EMPD) holder confirms 12.1% stake and sends board letter
feed.summary: Tice P. Brown, a significant shareholder in Empery Digital Inc. (EMPD), has confirmed a 12.1% beneficial ownership stake through an amended Schedule 13D filing. This increase in reported ownership is due to a decrease in the company's total shares outstanding rather than new purchases. Brown has also sent a letter to the board and stockholders concerning the share repurchase program and governance, while reserving the right for future strategic actions despite not proceeding with a self-nomination to the board at this time.

feed.title: 5.40% callable notes from U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) due 2041, $1,000 each
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) is offering Senior Medium-Term Callable Fixed Rate Notes due May 6, 2041, with an interest rate of 5.40% per annum. The notes have a principal amount of $1,000 each and interest is payable monthly. U.S. Bancorp has the option to redeem the notes early, starting August 6, 2028.

feed.title: Globe Life Insider Sold Shares Worth $555,168, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Globe Life Inc. recently sold shares totaling $555,168, as reported in a new SEC filing. This transaction occurred on April 27, 2026, and was published by MT Newswires. Globe Life Inc. is a holding company primarily focused on life and health insurance.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) offers 20‑yr callable senior notes, 6.00% coupon
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp is offering 20-year callable senior notes with a 6.00% annual interest rate, maturing on May 13, 2046. The notes are callable quarterly by the issuer beginning May 13, 2027, and are unsecured obligations of U.S. Bancorp, not FDIC insured. Minimum denominations are $1,000 per note, with selling commissions up to $40.00 per $1,000 note.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Webcast of its 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call May 1, 2026 - Now at 8:00 a.m. ET and its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 8, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has announced a revised schedule for its 2026 first quarter earnings conference call, which will now take place on May 1, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. This change is due to a scheduling conflict. Additionally, the company will webcast its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 8, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET.

feed.title: Dividend reduction weighs on Crown Castle stock with 3.20% decline
feed.summary: Crown Castle International Corp. (CCI) stock dropped 3.20% today to $83.58, following its Q1 2026 restructuring which included workforce reductions and a 32% year-over-year dividend cut to $1.0625 per share. The stock is trading below key moving averages, indicating short-to-medium term downward pressure and is expected to remain range-bound between $81.50 and $85.80, with recovery dependent on reclaiming key technical levels. Expert Viktoras Karapetjanc believes the cost-saving measures could stabilize the company amidst sector headwinds, but sentiment must improve for a bullish reversal.

feed.title: Dyadic Announces Strategic Partnership Agreement to Develop Affordable Rabies Prophylactics and Vaccines Using its Proprietary C1 Cell Microbial Protein Production Platform
feed.summary: Dyadic International, Inc. has announced a strategic partnership with Rabian BV to develop affordable rabies prophylactics and vaccines using Dyadic's proprietary C1 protein production platform. This collaboration, partially funded by Eurostars, aims to address the global burden of rabies, especially in lower- and middle-income countries. Dyadic will receive an equity stake, fully funded R&D costs, and royalties from the commercialization of these new products.

feed.title: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) Q1 Preview: Tariff Clarity and Margin Recovery Are the Real Story
feed.summary: Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) is set to report its Q1 2026 earnings, with investors focused on tariff clarity and margin recovery as key indicators of the company's multi-year transformation program. Analysts expect around $3.75 billion in revenue and $0.59 EPS, with the gross margin being the most critical data point. The company has stated it anticipates mitigating recent Section 232 tariff changes without materially impacting 2026 guidance, and investors will seek specifics on this strategy during the earnings call.

feed.title: Custom Truck One Source stock hits 52-week high at 8.97 USD
feed.summary: Custom Truck One Source Inc.'s stock reached a 52-week high of $8.97, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 112.65% increase over the past year. Despite trading above its Fair Value according to InvestingPro analysis, the company's strategic initiatives have resonated with investors. This comes after the company exceeded fourth-quarter EPS expectations, although revenue fell short of forecasts, with DA Davidson maintaining a Buy rating.

feed.title: Goldman's Neil Mehta: Willow project will drive ConocoPhillips' profitability
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Neil Mehta highlights the Willow project as a key driver for ConocoPhillips' profitability. The project is expected to significantly enhance the company's financial performance.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) Price Target Lowered to $18.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) from $19.00 to $18.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This revised target suggests a potential downside of 1.60% from the previous closing price. Despite several other firms also trimming their targets, the analyst consensus for NCLH remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $24.72, reflecting mixed sentiment among analysts.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (USB) launches 5.70% callable notes maturing May 2046
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) has launched Senior Medium-Term Notes, which are callable fixed-rate notes with a 5.70% annual interest rate and a maturity date of May 6, 2046. The notes are unsecured senior obligations issued in minimum denominations of $1,000, with optional redemption beginning May 6, 2029. These notes are not FDIC insured and are subject to U.S. Bancorp's credit risk.

feed.title: Delek US (NYSE:DK) Given New $44.00 Price Target at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target for Delek US (NYSE:DK) from $60.00 to $44.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting an 8.06% potential upside from its previous close. This adjustment follows Delek US's recent quarterly earnings, where it reported $0.44 EPS, surpassing estimates, but missed revenue expectations. The consensus price target among analysts for Delek US is also around $44.15 with an average "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks stock gains 2.49% as Quantum-Safe Summit explores meeting government security mandates
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock increased by 2.49% as the company's Quantum-Safe Summit discussed strategies for meeting government security mandates using a three-step path: discovery, protection, and acceleration. The stock shows strong short- and medium-term bullish momentum but faces long-term resistance. Analysts suggest limited further upside in the short term, with a higher probability of sideways trading or a downside move if support levels are breached.

feed.title: Medtronic reports data breach on corporate IT systems
feed.summary: Medtronic announced a data breach on its corporate IT systems, confirming that an unauthorized party accessed data. The company has stated that this incident has not impacted its products, customer connections, manufacturing, distribution, or patient safety, as corporate IT systems are separate from these operational networks. Medtronic is investigating whether personal information was accessed but does not anticipate a material impact on its business or financial results.

feed.title: A Look At CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation As Buyback And Refocused Strategy Follow Activist Pressure
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) has launched a US$1.50 billion share repurchase program and is refocusing on its core commercial real estate data and marketplace businesses following activist pressure. Despite a downturn in share price over the past year, analysts and DCF models suggest the stock might be undervalued, hinging on aggressive growth and margin assumptions. The article explores the potential for CoStar Group as a buying opportunity versus the risks associated with its redefined strategy.

feed.title: What Enterprise Financial Services (EFSC)'s Margin Expansion, Flat Earnings and Higher Dividend Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: Enterprise Financial Services Corp (EFSC) reported Q1 2026 results including increased net interest income, flat net income, and a higher quarterly dividend. The company also announced ongoing share repurchases and progress in capital management and asset quality. While reinforcing its focus on net interest margin strength and disciplined credit, investors should note the credit concentration risks in commercial real estate and specialty lending.

feed.title: Altria Celebrates America by Investing in Our Growers, Communities, Employees and Iconic Brands
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. is celebrating America's 250th birthday with incremental investments of over $8 million over the next three years. These investments will support American tobacco growers, communities, employees, and iconic brands through philanthropic initiatives, including establishing endowments at the University of Kentucky and Virginia Tech, providing donor-advised funds for local needs and disaster relief, and engaging employees in volunteerism and civic participation. The company emphasizes its long history of supporting U.S. agriculture, jobs, and communities while continuing its commitment to the long-term sustainability of tobacco farming.

feed.title: $8M for tobacco regions: Altria backs colleges, disaster funds
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. (NYSE: MO) is investing over $8 million over the next three years to support American tobacco growers, communities, and employees, coinciding with America's 250th birthday. This funding will establish endowments at the University of Kentucky and Virginia Tech agriculture colleges, provide donor-advised funds for community needs and disaster relief in tobacco-growing regions, and engage nearly 6,000 employees in volunteerism and civic participation. The initiative aims to strengthen agricultural education, ensure the sustainability of tobacco farming, and support communities in Virginia, North Carolina, and Kentucky.

feed.title: Verizon Earnings: Customer Metrics Improve as Cost-Cutting Offsets Weak Revenue
feed.summary: Verizon's first-quarter earnings show a 2.9% revenue growth, although sales would have declined by 1.0% excluding the Frontier acquisition. The company successfully attracted 55,000 new postpaid phone customers, reversing previous losses, despite elevated wireless churn and a 1.9% decline in average revenue per postpaid wireless account. Verizon is banking on cost-cutting and new wireless plans to combat intense competition and expressed confidence in meeting financial forecasts, with a maintained fair value estimate of $53.

feed.title: Greenland Energy (GLND) Signs Agreement With Halliburton for 2026 Jameson Land Basin Drilling Campaign
feed.summary: Greenland Energy (GLND) has signed an agreement with Halliburton for integrated consulting and logistical management services to support its 2026 onshore drilling campaign in the Jameson Land Basin. This agreement covers planning, coordination, and transportation of equipment and services, including comprehensive well and drilling services. It forms a crucial part of Greenland Energy's integrated Arctic operations strategy, building on previous agreements with Stampede Drilling and Desgagnés.

feed.title: Claude Mythos Launch Delayed: Anthropic's Advanced AI and Its Impact on Cybersecurity
feed.summary: Anthropic has delayed the broad release of its advanced large language model, Claude Mythos, due to security concerns over its ability to identify and exploit code vulnerabilities. The company has launched Project Glasswing, granting select cybersecurity firms like Palo Alto Networks early access to Mythos to collaboratively identify and patch vulnerabilities. This dynamic is expected to increase demand for cybersecurity solutions and may favor larger firms like Palo Alto Networks in an evolving threat landscape.

feed.title: First Business Financial Services (NASDAQ:FBIZ) Given "Buy" Rating at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson has reaffirmed a "Buy" rating for First Business Financial Services (NASDAQ:FBIZ), setting a price target of $65, indicating a potential 14% upside. This aligns with an average analyst target of $65.50, driven by the company's strong Q1 earnings, which surpassed expectations with an EPS of $1.44 and revenue of $44.29 million. Institutional investors collectively own over 60% of FBIZ shares, with several prominent funds recently increasing their holdings.

feed.title: Amplify Ethereum 3% monthly option income ETF declares $0.3279 dividend
feed.summary: Amplify Ethereum 3% Monthly Option Income ETF (NYSEARCA: AETH) has declared a monthly dividend of $0.3279 per share. The dividend is payable on May 7, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 2, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of May 1, 2026. This announcement highlights the ETF's strategy to provide investors with regular monthly income.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says “I Think Apple’s Doing Exceptionally Well”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a bullish outlook on Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) during a recent "Mad Money" episode, despite upcoming leadership changes with Tim Cook handing reins to John Ternus. Cramer believes Apple has strong momentum to continue through the end of the year, driven by new phones, foldables, and the iPhone 17 line. He advises investors to "own it, don't trade it."

feed.title: A Look At Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (CRNX) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
feed.summary: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (CRNX) has shown mixed recent share performance, with short-term declines contrasting with positive long-term returns. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the company's fair value is $82.43 per share, significantly higher than its current trading price of $38.33, based on potential revenue growth from its clinical pipeline, particularly PALSONIFY. However, this optimistic outlook is subject to risks such as slower-than-expected uptake or further pipeline delays.

feed.title: Caterpillar and Deere Hit Opposite Cycle Peaks: One Rides Momentum, One Hunts Value
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) and Deere & Company (DE) exhibited contrasting performance in their latest earnings reports, placing them at opposite ends of their respective business cycles. Caterpillar, fueled by record data center demand, achieved record Q4 revenue but faced compressed margins due to tariffs. Deere, despite a decline in its large agriculture segment, raised its FY2026 net income guidance, positioning itself at a cycle bottom with re-accelerating construction and promising precision agriculture investments.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Maintains Aptiv PLC(APTV.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $84
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has reiterated its Buy rating on Aptiv PLC (APTV.US) and increased its target price for the stock to $84. This update reflects the bank's continued confidence in the company's performance and future outlook.

feed.title: HSBC Adjusts Price Target on Aptiv to $75 From $81.32, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: HSBC has reiterated its Buy rating on Aptiv (NYSE: APTV) but has lowered its price target to $75 from the previous $81.32. This adjustment reflects a revised valuation while maintaining a positive outlook on the company's stock.

feed.title: TD Cowen Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Live Oak Bancshares (NYSE:LOB) Stock Price
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reduced its price target for Live Oak Bancshares (NYSE:LOB) to $47 from $51, while maintaining a "buy" rating, implying a potential 24.64% upside. Despite beating quarterly EPS estimates, the company's revenue was slightly below expectations, and insider selling has been observed. Analyst consensus is currently "Hold" with a target price of $44.40.

feed.title: RMNI Maintains Hold by TD Cowen -- Price Target Lowered to $4.00
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Andrew Sherman has maintained a Hold rating on Rimini Street (RMNI) but lowered the price target from $4.25 to $4.00, reflecting a cautious outlook due to reassessments of the company's growth potential and market dynamics. GuruFocus indicates RMNI is 15.8% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $3.03 against its current price of $3.51, and its GF Score™ of 69/100 points to moderate long-term return potential despite challenges in revenue growth. Insider activity shows $0.9 million in selling over the last three months with no buying, suggesting a lack of insider confidence.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Nucor: “Easily the Best Industrial in This Market”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Nucor (NUE) as "easily the best industrial in this market," hoping for a dip in its stock price to allow for a better entry point. He noted that despite a mixed quarter, the company benefits significantly from steel tariffs, which protect it from foreign competition. Cramer also emphasized CEO Leon Topalian's positive outlook on the supportive trade environment for U.S. manufacturing.

feed.title: Chubb: Still Boring, Still Profitable (NYSE:CB)
feed.summary: Chubb consistently demonstrates strong underwriting stability and profitability, with a 10-year combined ratio of 89.6% and a 84% ratio in Q1 2026. The company is diversifying through its expanding life insurance segment, which saw 34% premium growth and now contributes 9% to consolidated segment income. With an expected FY2026 net income between $8.6B and $10.9B, the stock is valued at 11.6x–14.7x earnings, potentially offering up to 20% upside, supported by a robust capital return profile including significant share buybacks and a projected 5% dividend increase.

feed.title: MetLife plots $170M Water Tower Place revamp as part of Mag Mile rebound
feed.summary: MetLife is investing $170 million to redevelop Chicago's Water Tower Place on the Magnificent Mile, four years after acquiring the property through foreclosure. The multi-faceted plan includes a potential conversion of upper floors into medical office space, addressing the voids left by former major tenants. This significant investment is part of a broader resurgence on the Magnificent Mile, marked by new retail leases and a decline in vacancy rates.

feed.title: Washington, DC, sues MAA for alleged deceptive advertising
feed.summary: The Office of the Attorney General for Washington, D.C., has filed a lawsuit against Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) and its subsidiaries, alleging deceptive advertising and the charging of illegal "junk fees." The lawsuit claims that MAA overcharged tenants by assessing various fees for services that should have been included in the rent and misled prospective renters with deceptively low "starting at" prices. The OAG is seeking to stop these practices, obtain restitution for tenants, and levy civil penalties and costs against MAA.

feed.title: Ranking the Magnificent Seven Stocks
feed.summary: Ross Gerber, CEO of Gerber Kawasaki, shared his rankings of the Magnificent Seven stocks in a recent interview, noting that his firm's ETF holds six of them. He highlighted Nvidia and Alphabet positively, while identifying Micron Technology as an overlooked stock he expects to reach a trillion-dollar valuation soon. Gerber explained his investment strategy, including his previous critical stance on Tesla and CEO Elon Musk, leading to its removal from the ETF.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences (GILD) Builds Defensive Moat With HIV Franchise Ahead of May 7 Earnings
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) has become a sought-after defensive stock due to its stable HIV portfolio, growing oncology pipeline, and no major near-term loss of exclusivity. The company's Q1 2026 earnings report on May 7 will assess the strength of this defensive thesis amidst a challenging macro environment. Key areas to watch include HIV segment revenue, the early ramp of the new HIV prevention therapy Yeztugo, and reaffirmation of the full-year 2026 non-GAAP EPS guidance.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in April: Score $1k & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: The Caesars Casino bonus code ROTOCASLAUNCH in April offers new players a $10 no deposit bonus, a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, and 2,500 Caesars Rewards Credits. This promotion is available in Michigan, New Jersey, West Virginia, and Pennsylvania, providing both immediate play and long-term value through the Caesars Rewards program. The offer includes reasonable wagering requirements on select slot games, making it a competitive welcome bonus in the online casino market.

feed.title: Can Digital Realty (DLR) Capitalize on the AI-driven Data Center Demand?
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR) is positioned to benefit from the increasing demand for data centers driven by AI. Stifel recently raised its price target for DLR to $230, citing the company's strong infrastructure and balance sheet. Digital Realty is also set to launch its next-generation interconnection solution, ServiceFabric, in Indonesia later this year.

feed.title: Credo Technology (CRDO) Highlights Solutions for Memory Bottlenecks to Boost AI Inference Scalability
feed.summary: Credo Technology (CRDO) is actively showcasing its solutions to address memory bottlenecks in AI inference scalability. The company is highlighting its OmniConnect family solution, Weaver, and its 224G PAM4 SerDes IP at the TSMC 2026 Technology Symposium. Additionally, Credo recently acquired DustPhotonics to accelerate its optical interconnect roadmap and expand its market in the global optical industry, a move crucial for its AI connectivity strategy.

feed.title: Eaton Corp. (ETN) Strengthens Customer Support Commitment with Expanded Authorized Service Center Agreement
feed.summary: Eaton Corporation plc (ETN) has expanded its authorized service center agreement with Air Support to enhance customer-centric aftermarket support and localized repair solutions. This move reinforces Eaton's commitment to providing high-quality repairs closer to where aircraft operate, especially given Air Support's strong performance as Eaton's first authorized aerospace service center in EMEA. The company's stock has seen significant year-on-year growth and Citigroup recently raised its price target for ETN.

feed.title: Can Constellation Energy (CEG) Capitalize on the Growing Demand for Clean Electricity?
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) has seen significant stock growth and strong analyst ratings, driven by its acquisition of Calpine Corporation and its focus on clean electricity. The company, the world's largest private-sector power producer, plans substantial capital spending and share buybacks to meet increasing demand. While recognized for its potential, the article suggests other AI stocks might offer higher, quicker returns.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock Up on Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Despite Regulatory Risks - News and Statistics
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group's stock rose after beating Q1 2026 earnings expectations, driven by lower operating costs and a better-than-forecast medical benefit ratio. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $7.23 and revenue of $111.7 billion, surpassing analyst projections. However, long-term concerns persist due to previous underperformance, ongoing investigations into billing practices, and potential regulatory risks, prompting analysts to advise a cautious approach for investors.

feed.title: The Progressive Corporation to Host Investor Relations Conference Call on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: The Progressive Corporation will host an Investor Relations conference call on May 5, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring CEO Tricia Griffith and CFO John Sauerland. The call will include a Q&A session for phone participants, and an audio-only webcast will also be available. The company plans to file its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q with the SEC and post its Shareholders’ Report on its website the day before the call, with a replay available until May 6, 2027.
